programmes.show_description: Explore Weird Fish, new to QVC. Discover casual, comfortable clothing with unique designs, perfect for relaxed days and effortless style.
Ben de Lisi is bringing his gorgeous fashion aesthetic to QVC UK. With a focus on beautiful fabrics and innovative design, Ben's distinctive look is the epitome of modern elegance.
Elevate your style with Ruth Langsford's chic fashion collection. From classic jeans to vibrant prints, find the perfect pieces to boost your fashion confidence.
Step into Style with Sam
It's your last chance to get your hands on these great deals from our Fashion event.

Relax in style and comfort with our great range of everyday shoes, including comfy flats, supportive trainers and chic sandals. Tune in now for an hour of casual footwear perfect for your new routine.
Founded in Penzance, Cornwall in 1981, Seasalt offer high quality, functional and timelessly styling clothing to complement your wardrobe throughout the year.

Step up your style for the new season with Denim & Co. fashion! From gorgeous dresses to must-have accessories, find your new favourite wardrobe winners here at QVC.

Refresh your wardrobe with Ben de Lisi's Spring Fashion. Discover stylish, versatile pieces designed to brighten your look and add effortless elegance to your everyday.
Showcasing the fashionable and classic bags created by this international brand, including handbags, rucksacks, travel bags and weekend away bags.
Step out in style in Skechers! Renowned for their on-trend, sporty designs, you can now find their fab shoes at QVC too!
Showcasing a wide range of beautiful Diamonique designs in both silver and gold, this show offers an emporium of both the classic and essential looks plus unusual rare cuts and sparkling colours.
